Case# CGWindowSharingType.readWrite

Mac CatalystmacOS

```
case readWrite
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowsharingtype/readwrite#Discussion)

The window is shared and its contents can be read and modified by any process.
